calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, THE BEST SERVICE CO., INC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JERRY CHENG.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $49,793.98
Pre-Judgment Interest: $13,326.71
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $527.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $66,473.19
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Continued To May-21-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
